changes.commit: **Scatter**: Fix sampler position using incorrect position.
**Scatter**: Tiling option now separate X and Y axis.
**PB Shine**: Node will now output to transparent bg when no surface is connected.
**MK Cables**: Add endpoint swinging.
**Transform, Repeat, Scatter, Particle**: Add Clean Edge interpolation algorithm.
**Palette Selector**: Add recents section.
**Scatter**: Add Scale Random option.
**Scatter**: Fix amount input disappear when setting source to map while setting distribution to poisson.
**Scatter**: Add "Stop" option for ended animation.
**UV Nodes**: UV inputs now apply alpha.
**Scatter**: Add point editing tool in points array mode.
**RM Render Scatter**: Add origin position, rotation control.
Introduced
**Graph Panel**: Fix deselecting node with double click not reseting inspector panel scroll position.
**Scatter**: Fix value map doesn't work.
**Scatter**: Add tiling option for all scatter source type.
**Shadow**: Add oversample setting.
**Scatter**: Add offset transformation properties.
**RM Primitive] Add specular property. - [RM Render**: Add light color, intensity properties.
**Graph Panel**: Pasting nodes while hovering on inline group will add the nodes to the group.
**Locale**: Remove comments and duplicated entries in words.json
